CustomField.description: Can we have a 'notify accounts' flag (see above) in the payment record. If this is set to yes the system would add this payment to the Accounts Team 'tasks' 4 days before the due date i.e. if due 7 days before the service date then it would notify accounts 11 days before.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When ticked a task will be created for Account Team 4 days before the due date. (Only use if payment is due before the end of a month)
CustomField.label: Notify for Deposit
